sections.paragraph:
Original: פּה

Transliteration: peh

Phonetic: peh

BDB Definition:

  1. mouth
    1. mouth (of man)
    2. mouth (as organ of speech)
    3. mouth (of animals)
    4. mouth, opening, orifice (of a well, river, etc)
    5. extremity, end
  2. a weight equal to one third of a shekel, occurs only in 1Sa 13:21

Origin: from H6284

TWOT entry: 1738

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
